types.name: INT
types.description: Signed 4-byte integer. Range: -2147483648 to 2147483647. UNSIGNED: 0 to 4294967295.

types.name: BIGINT
types.description: Signed 8-byte integer. UNSIGNED: 0 to 18446744073709551615.

types.name: SMALLINT
types.description: Signed 2-byte integer. Range: -32768 to 32767. UNSIGNED: 0 to 65535.

types.name: TINYINT
types.description: Signed 1-byte integer. Range: -128 to 127. UNSIGNED: 0 to 255. TINYINT(1) is the standard boolean.

types.name: MEDIUMINT
types.description: Signed 3-byte integer. Range: -8388608 to 8388607. UNSIGNED: 0 to 16777215.

types.name: DECIMAL
types.description: Exact fixed-point number. M = total digits (1-65), D = digits after decimal point (0-30).

types.name: FLOAT
types.description: Single-precision 4-byte floating-point number (approx 7 significant digits).
types.notes: Avoid using M,D in MySQL 8.0.17+ as they are deprecated.

types.name: DOUBLE
types.description: Double-precision 8-byte floating-point number (approx 15 significant digits).

types.name: BIT
types.description: Bit-field type. M = number of bits (1-64). BIT(1) is commonly used as boolean.

types.name: BOOLEAN
types.description: Synonym for TINYINT(1). Values: 0 = false, non-zero = true.

types.name: VARCHAR
types.description: Variable-length string. M = max length in characters (0-65535 depending on row format and charset).

types.name: CHAR
types.description: Fixed-length string padded with spaces. M = 0-255 characters.
types.storage: M × W bytes (W = bytes per character)

types.name: TEXT
types.description: Variable-length string up to 65535 characters. No default value allowed.

types.name: MEDIUMTEXT
types.description: Variable-length string up to 16777215 characters.

types.name: LONGTEXT
types.description: Variable-length string up to 4294967295 characters.

types.name: TINYTEXT
types.description: Variable-length string up to 255 characters.

types.name: BLOB
types.description: Binary Large Object up to 65535 bytes.

types.name: MEDIUMBLOB
types.description: Binary Large Object up to 16777215 bytes.

types.name: LONGBLOB
types.description: Binary Large Object up to 4294967295 bytes.

types.name: TINYBLOB
types.description: Binary Large Object up to 255 bytes.

types.name: BINARY
types.description: Fixed-length binary string of M bytes, right-padded with 0x00.

types.name: VARBINARY
types.description: Variable-length binary string up to M bytes.

types.name: ENUM
types.description: String from a predefined list. Up to 65535 distinct values.

types.name: SET
types.description: String that can hold zero or more values from a predefined list. Up to 64 members.

types.name: DATETIME
types.description: Date and time. Range: 1000-01-01 00:00:00.000000 – 9999-12-31 23:59:59.999999. fsp = fractional seconds precision (0-6).

types.name: TIMESTAMP
types.description: Timestamp stored as UTC. Range: 1970-01-01 00:00:01 UTC – 2038-01-19 03:14:07 UTC. Auto-updates on INSERT/UPDATE by default.

types.name: TIME
types.description: Time of day or elapsed time. Range: -838:59:59 – 838:59:59.

types.name: YEAR
types.description: 4-digit year. Range: 1901 – 2155.

types.name: JSON
types.description: JSON document. Stored in binary format for efficient parsing. Supports JSON functions and path expressions.

types.name: GEOMETRY
types.description: Base spatial type that can store any type of geometry.

types.name: POINT
types.description: Single location in coordinate space (X, Y).

types.name: LINESTRING
types.description: Curve with linear interpolation between points.

types.name: POLYGON
types.description: Planar surface defined by exterior boundary and optional holes.

types.name: MULTIPOINT
types.description: Collection of Points.

types.name: MULTILINESTRING
types.description: Collection of LineStrings.

types.name: MULTIPOLYGON
types.description: Collection of Polygons.

types.name: GEOMETRYCOLLECTION
types.description: Collection of geometries of any type.
